site.tagline: Engineering for the age of AI agents.
site.description: krutrimind is a consultancy building web, mobile and software solutions powered by AI agent automation. We design intelligent systems that compound your team's output.

hero.subtitle: We build web, mobile and software products fused with AI agent automation — turning workflows into self-driving systems that scale your team's output.

services.title: Build, automate, scale — with one partner.
services.description: From the first line of code to the AI agents that maintain it, we own the full stack so your team can ship.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Performant, SEO-ready sites and dashboards. Next.js, React, Astro — built for speed and conversion.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Cross-platform apps that feel native. React Native and Flutter, shipped to App Store & Play Store.

items.title: Custom Software
items.description: Bespoke platforms, APIs and integrations. Cloud-native architecture on AWS, GCP and Azure.

items.title: AI Agent Automation
items.description: Agentic systems that read, decide and act — automating ops, support, sales and internal workflows.

agents.description: We design AI agents that integrate with the tools you already use — Slack, Gmail, Notion, your CRM, your codebase — and run quietly in the background, 24/7.

approach.title: A focused process. No agency theater.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: A 60-min call to map your goals, constraints and where AI actually pays off. You leave with a plan, free of charge.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.description: In 1–2 weeks we ship a working slice — real data, real users, real decisions you can make from.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Tight 2-week sprints. Weekly demos. One Slack channel. You see progress, not status updates.

steps.title: Operate
steps.description: We monitor, iterate and train your team — or run it for you. Agents keep working while you sleep.

portfolio.title: Products & systems we've shipped.
portfolio.description: A snapshot of recent engagements — from AI-native SaaS to internal automation that quietly does six-figure work.

items.title: Sales Copilot · agentic outbound
items.summary: A multi-agent system that researches accounts, drafts outbound, and books meetings — with humans approving the moments that matter.

items.title: Clinic ops dashboard
items.summary: Real-time operations dashboard across 28 clinics, replacing 11 spreadsheets and a nightly email digest.

items.title: Mobile app · subscriptions + community
items.summary: Cross-platform RN app with offline-first sync, push, in-app subs and a creator-led community.

items.title: Support agent · tier-1 deflection
items.summary: An agent that triages, answers, and escalates — wired into Intercom, Linear and your knowledge base.

items.title: Headless commerce rebuild
items.summary: Migrated a legacy storefront to a headless Next.js + Shopify stack. INP < 200ms on mobile.

items.title: Data platform & ELT
items.summary: End-to-end data platform — ingestion, warehouse, dbt, semantic layer, and an LLM-powered query agent on top.

testimonials.description: We don't do pilots that die in slides. Here's what working with krutrimind actually looks like.

items.quote: krutrimind built our outbound agent in five weeks. It now books more meetings than two of our SDRs combined — and our team finally trusts the data behind it.
items.name: Priya Raghavan

items.quote: They didn't just hand us a Figma. They embedded with our ops team, found the workflow that actually mattered, and replaced eleven spreadsheets with one tool we love.
items.name: Daniel Okafor

items.quote: Weekly demos, real shipped code, and zero agency theatre. Best engineering partner we've worked with — and we've tried a few.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The support agent they built handles 62% of our tier-1 tickets. Our CSAT went up, not down. That alone paid for the whole engagement in a quarter.
items.name: Marco Bianchi

items.quote: I was skeptical of yet another AI consultancy. Two sprints in, I was forwarding their Loom updates to our board as 'this is how engineering should feel.'
items.name: Amelia Park

items.quote: Senior engineers, opinionated in the right ways, and they ship. They taught my team things we still use six months after the project ended.
items.name: Rohan Mehta

items.quote: They quietly automated half of our finance close. I literally only notice it on the days something exceptional happens — which is exactly the point.
items.name: Elena García

items.quote: From scoping call to a working prototype in eight business days. The bar they set has rewired what we expect from vendors.
items.name: James Patel

academy.description: Practical courses and content for software engineers and tech aspirants who want to build with AI — not just talk about it.

items.title: Building Production AI Agents
items.description: Go from "ChatGPT wrapper" to reliable, observable agents running in production.

items.title: AI-Native Full-Stack
items.description: Modern web & app development where AI is a first-class part of the stack.

items.title: Field Notes & Deep Dives
items.description: Real lessons from real projects. No hype, no thread-bro takes.

contact.description: Tell us about your idea, your stack and your timeline. We reply within one business day.

footer.tagline: Engineering for the age of AI agents.
